entries.definition:
كتاب السّين

سنه - سني

(سنم) السين والنون والميم أصلٌ واحد، يدلُّ على العلوّ والارتفاع.فالسَّنَام معروف. وتسنَّمت: علَوت. وناقة سَنِمَةٌ: عظيمة السَّنام. وأسنمتُ النارَ : أعلَيْتُ لهبَها. وأَسْنُمَةُ: موضع.

(باب السين والهاء وما يثلثهما)

s–n–m to be high, to rise, to be the top part, camel hump. Of this root, only تسنيم tasnīm occurs once in the Qurʾan.
تسنيم tasnīm [n./v. n.] as a noun, it is said to be a name for a water spring in Paradise; as a verbal noun, it is said to mean being high or in a high place (83:27) وَمِزَاجُهُۥ مِن تَسْنِيمٍ and mixed with the water of Tasnim [also: it is composed of all that is most exalting].

s–n–m to be high, to rise, to be the top part, camel hump. Of this root, only تسنيم tasnīm occurs once in the Qurʾan.
تسنيم tasnīm [n./v. n.] as a noun, it is said to be a name for a water spring in Paradise; as a verbal noun, it is said to mean being high or in a high place (83:27) وَمِزَاجُهُۥ مِن تَسْنِيمٍ and mixed with the water of Tasnim [also: it is composed of all that is most exalting].
